name: Application Load Balancer
description: AWS Application/Network Load Balancer for traffic distribution

inputs.name: name
inputs.label: Load Balancer Name
inputs.description: Name of the load balancer (max 32 characters)

inputs.name: load_balancer_type
inputs.label: Load Balancer Type
inputs.description: Type of load balancer. Use 'application' for HTTP/HTTPS, 'network' for TCP/UDP

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.label: VPC ID
inputs.description: VPC where the load balancer will be deployed

inputs.name: subnets
inputs.label: Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated subnet IDs (use public subnets for internet-facing)

inputs.name: internal
inputs.label: Internal (not internet-facing)
inputs.description: If true, the load balancer will only be accessible within the VPC

inputs.name: security_groups
inputs.label: Security Group IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated security group IDs to attach to the ALB (not applicable for NLB)

inputs.name: enable_deletion_protection
inputs.label: Deletion Protection
inputs.description: Prevent accidental deletion of the load balancer

inputs.name: enable_cross_zone_load_balancing
inputs.label: Cross-Zone Load Balancing
inputs.description: Distribute traffic evenly across all targets in all enabled Availability Zones

inputs.name: idle_timeout
inputs.label: Idle Timeout (seconds)
inputs.description: Time the connection can be idle before being closed (ALB only, 1-4000)

inputs.name: ip_address_type
inputs.label: IP Address Type
inputs.description: Type of IP addresses used by the subnets

inputs.name: drop_invalid_header_fields
inputs.label: Drop Invalid Headers
inputs.description: Drop HTTP requests with invalid header fields (ALB security best practice)

inputs.name: enable_http2
inputs.label: Enable HTTP/2
inputs.description: Enable HTTP/2 for ALB (improves performance for modern clients)

inputs.name: target_groups
inputs.label: Target Groups (JSON)
inputs.description: Map of target group configurations. Each key is the target group name.

inputs.name: listeners
inputs.label: Listeners (JSON)
inputs.description: Map of listener configurations. Each key is the listener name.

inputs.name: access_logs
inputs.label: Access Logs (JSON)
inputs.description: S3 bucket configuration for access logs
